/ Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CLAY CAEL ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, AND ON BEHALF OF THE GENERAL PUBLIC's Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Without Prejudice.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss entire action without prejudice" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
